rationale: Both reviews correctly identify the same core scope violation in the diff (ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup and IsUnipotent as Layer-5/6 placeholders with True/nilpotence, before any Layers 0-5 or comodules/unipotent radical); acting on either removes them, yielding essentially the same scoped PR. The secondary disagreements (bundling vs. single-unit split) are either unconfirmable from the diff alone or stylistic/roadmap-preference matters no maintainer would insist on here.
